💪 Commercial Cleaning Service

Daily Gym Cleaning in Atlanta Metro

Seven-days-a-week cleaning for high-traffic facilities.

Santos Cleaning Solutions provides daily gym cleaning service across Atlanta Metro. Insured, background-checked teams. EPA-registered products. Written scope signed before work begins.

Get a Free Quote → Call (866) 350-9407

Why Daily Gym Cleaning Works

Urgent care clinics, 7-day fitness centers, childcare facilities open weekends, and any business with weekend foot traffic that accumulates dirt faster than 5-night cleaning can absorb.

  • Seven cleanings per week including weekends
  • Ideal for urgent care, 7-day fitness centers, and weekend-active daycares
  • Weekend cleaning keeps the space ready for Monday without weekend buildup
  • Daily reset of high-touch zones and restrooms
  • Backup team coverage for team absences or illness
PricingDaily service typically runs 30–40% more per month than standard nightly, reflecting the additional weekend visits.

Insurance & Compliance

All Santos Cleaning Solutions staff are background-checked, uniformed, and supervised. We carry General Liability $1,000,000 per occurrence, Products and Completed Operations $2,000,000 aggregate, and Personal and Advertising Injury $1,000,000. Certificate of Insurance available on request. We name clients as Additional Insured at no cost.

Daily Gym Cleaning: What Members Experience

Gyms that clean daily see measurable differences in member satisfaction scores and retention rates. When members walk in and every machine is wiped clean, the locker room smells fresh, and floors have no visible residue, they feel the difference immediately — and they come back. Our daily gym and fitness studio cleaning service happens every morning before your first member arrives or every evening after close, depending on your facility's peak hours. Equipment disinfection is our priority: all cardio machines, weight benches, free weights, resistance machines, mats, and handles are sanitized with EPA-registered disinfectants. Locker rooms receive full scrub-downs including shower floors, drains, and benches. Free weight areas are reorganized. Entrances and reception desks are polished. Daily service also means issues — a clogged drain, a damaged tile, a broken dispenser — are caught and reported every 24 hours before they become bigger problems.
